# Security Engineering God Skill

Use this meta skill for prompts like:
- build this securely end-to-end
- secure implementation and review pipeline
- harden this system before release

## Fused skills
- owasp-security
- tdd-guard
- context-engineering-kit
- superpowers-skill
- claude-mem

## Workflow
1. Threat model and risk triage.
2. Implement with secure coding controls.
3. Enforce tests and regression checks.
4. Run security review and mitigation pass.
5. Record residual risks and release checklist.

## Output contract
- Threat model
- Secure implementation changes
- Test/security validation results
- Risk and mitigation summary
